name: Maze (Skeleton Alcove)
description: This is one section of a maze of narrow stone passages, each helpfully indistinguishable from the last. The remains of a previous explorer lie here, arranged by time rather than intention. Nearby are the tools they carried: a rusty knife, a lantern that no longer serves a purpose, a skeleton key that arrived too late, and a leather bag heavy with coins. The maze appears unimpressed by all of it.
